⛳ Be first when a Red Run home hits

New listings on the course move fast — often before they're ever public. Join the members' alert list and you'll get a text and email the moment one lists.

Private to Kevin & Tommy. No spam, just Red Run. Reply STOP anytime.
"We don't just sell Red Run — we play it. Kevin and I are members, same as you."

What's your home worth right now?

Red Run is its own market. Get a real number — and what it means for your equity — from two people who know this course best. Discreetly, and off-market until you're ready. No sign in the yard until you say so.
Your Red Run Agent

Kevin DeVergilio

REALTEAM Real Estate. Kevin tracks every listing, sale, and coming-soon on the course — so you're never the last to know. Want a private, no-obligation value on your home? Five-minute conversation.

CallTextEmail
Your Red Run Lender

Tommy Lower · TTMG

Tommy the Mortgage Guy — call or text directly, no call centers, no gatekeepers. Pulling equity from a home you love, or financing a move to a bigger lot on the course? Ask Tommy what your buying power looks like today.
